{{Short description|Example regression page}}
==Overview==
This is a representative article with a citation.<ref name="source">A source with {{Cite web|title=Example|url=https://example.test}}</ref>

===List===
* First item
* Second item with [[Example|a link]]

{| class="wikitable"
! Name !! Value
|-
| Alpha || 1
|-
| Beta || {{N/a}}
|}

<syntaxhighlight lang="lua">
local value = "{{not a template}}"
</syntaxhighlight>

{{DEFAULTSORT:Regression, Sample}}
[[Category:Examples]]
[[Category:Formatter tests|Regression]]
